summary: Huijia Lin's official UW-hosted bio page states that she received a Ph.D. in Computer Science from Cornell University and later completed postdoctoral research at MIT CSAIL and Boston University.

undergraduate.note: The reviewed official UW-hosted bio page does not state an undergraduate institution.

masters.note: The reviewed official UW-hosted bio page does not mention a master's degree.

phd.note: The official UW-hosted bio page states that she received a Ph.D. in Computer Science from Cornell University, but it does not name an advisor.

postdoc.note: The official UW-hosted bio page states that she completed postdoctoral research at MIT CSAIL and the Department of Computer Science at Boston University. The current schema has one postdoc slot, so the structured school records MIT and the note preserves both institutions.
